headline: 今日娱乐：痴迷领跑，龙族热度不减
headlineEn: Today's Entertainment: 'Obsession' Leads, 'Dragon Clan' Still Hot
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》持续霸榜，《权力的游戏前传：龙族》热度不减。本周新片《福尔摩斯小姐3》等受关注，多部大片即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' continues to dominate, and 'Game of Thrones Prequel: Dragon Clan' remains popular. New films this week include 'Enola Holmes 3', with several blockbusters upcoming.

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周上映引期待
industryHighlights.en: 'Enola Holmes 3' releases this week with high anticipation

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片定档未来
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming blockbusters like 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' scheduled
